settings.text:
Every inquiry is read by a human — usually by Clara or Sena. If your date is open and the fit feels right, we'll come back to you within three business days with a few follow-up questions and a time to talk.

No pressure, no pitch, no automated form letter.

settings.title: Your date
settings.description: Exact if you have it, a window if you don't. We'll tell you honestly whether it's available.

settings.title: Your venue or region
settings.description: Booked already, or a shortlist, or just a rough sense — Hudson Valley, coastal Maine, abroad.

settings.title: Rough guest count
settings.description: A ballpark is fine. Thirty people and three hundred are very different days.

settings.title: How you found us
settings.description: A referral, a feature, an Instagram rabbit hole — we're curious.

settings.title: What you're hoping we can help with
settings.description: A sentence is enough. We'll ask the rest on the call.

settings.title: After you write.
settings.description: We keep the process slow on purpose — every couple deserves a real conversation, not a form-letter reply.

settings.title: We read every inquiry
settings.description: Not a form letter, not an auto-reply. Clara or Sena reads what you wrote and decides how to respond personally.

settings.title: Reply within three business days
settings.description: Sometimes sooner. You'll hear back with a few follow-up questions and — if the date's available — a link to book a call.

settings.title: The discovery call
settings.description: Forty-five minutes on the phone or video. A real conversation about your day, your vision, and whether we're the right studio to help you build it.

settings.title: Still have a question?
settings.text:
The Services page has more detail on pricing, tiers, and what each engagement includes.

Or skip straight to the inquiry — the discovery call is the fastest way to get a real answer to a specific question.

settings.question: How soon will we hear back?
settings.answer: Within three business days, almost always. If we're in the middle of a wedding week it may be four — but never longer than that without a note from us explaining why.

settings.question: What if our date is already booked?
settings.answer: We'll say so honestly and recommend two or three planners we trust for your region and style. A good referral is more useful than a vague maybe.

settings.question: Is the first call actually free?
settings.answer: Yes. Forty-five minutes, no prep, no obligation. You'll leave the call knowing whether it makes sense to keep talking.

settings.question: Can we email directly instead?
settings.answer: Yes — hello@everafter.studio works. Just know the form tends to get a faster reply because it routes to the whole team, not one inbox.
